component_definition.component_id: sha256 of the sorted query_id list with the fixed autoscholar-query-component-v1 namespace; identifiers label components only and never affect edges
component_definition.membership: every query belongs to exactly one transitive connected component, including isolated singleton queries

metric_diagnostics.aggregation: query-equal macro mean over the frozen per-query numeric metric values
metric_diagnostics.autoscholar_record160: 160 frozen cases with at least one successful source; the two no-success cases remain explicit and are not assigned fabricated metrics
metric_diagnostics.existing65: frozen SciFact 50 plus AutoScholarQuery dev 10 and val 5

exact_duplicate: unicode punctuation and underscore to spaces
normalization.near_duplicate_tokens: Unicode alphanumeric word tokens excluding underscore, after exact normalization and fixed stopword removal
normalization.short_query_protection: exact normalized duplicates remain eligible; lexical near-duplicate edges require the fixed minimum informative token count for both queries

strata.contaminated_component: a component is cross-stratum contaminated when it contains a query with more than one frozen evidence membership or contains distinct queries from more than one exclusive partition
strata.metric_filter: the diagnostic decontaminated view removes every case in a contaminated component; SciFact cases are retained because they are outside the AutoScholarQuery graph
strata.overlap: raw memberships may overlap and are reported; the exclusive partition is used only to locate cross-stratum graph connections
strata.remainder: all 1000-query manifest members outside auto_dev, auto_val, and the complete 162-case Record artifact
